prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a black frame, then cuts to a close-up of a white-and-blue flag waving against a bright blue sky. The flag carries a stylized wordmark that appears to read something like “SABITZ,” though the folds make the lettering partly unclear.

It then cuts to a sunny beach scene. A shirtless young man with curly dark hair stands in shallow water or at the shoreline, wearing red-and-white vertically striped swim trunks. His skin appears noticeably sunburned. Behind him are a sandy beach, rows of blue umbrellas, palm trees, and a tall white lighthouse.

Next, the setting shifts to a tree-lined path or resort road. A woman in bright pink/red clothing sits in a small open vehicle or cart, facing forward. Other people stand in the background. A green roadside sign with white writing is visible, but the text is too small/unclear to read.

The commercial then cuts indoors to a rustic, wood-paneled room with ski equipment. Several people are present; two people in the foreground wear winter/ski clothing and stand near skis and gear. Large windows show mountains or a snowy-looking outdoor landscape in the distance.

The scene changes to a bright modern resort with a turquoise swimming pool, white balconies, palm trees, and lounge chairs. A shirtless middle-aged man in patterned swim shorts stands on an upper walkway or balcony, looking outward with his hands on his hips. A closer shot follows, showing his shorts and legs near a glass railing, then another closer shot of his upper body and face on the same balcony.

The commercial cuts to a bedroom. A young man and a woman lie side by side under bedding in a large tufted bed. They look toward each other in the overhead shot. A wider view follows from the doorway, showing the bed centered between bedside lamps, with curtains and a small table or tray area to one side.

Next, two people are shown relaxing separately in square wooden hot-tub-like tubs on an outdoor terrace overlooking the ocean. Only their heads and upper shoulders are visible above the tub edges. Large potted plants frame the scene.

The setting then moves to a poolside area. An older woman reclines on a turquoise-striped chaise lounge beside a large pool. She wears oversized white sunglasses, a head covering, earrings, and a light-colored cover-up. A person in white clothing walks in the background near the pool. A closer shot shows the woman smiling and turning slightly while seated on the lounge.

The commercial cuts back briefly to the wood-paneled ski room. The two people in ski clothing stand in front of racks of skis and look forward.

It then returns to the beach. The sunburned young man is shown in close-up, lifting or adjusting green-tinted sunglasses on his face. The lighthouse and blue beach umbrellas are visible behind him.

Another close-up returns to the older woman at the poolside lounge. She is shown in profile/three-quarter view, still wearing the white sunglasses, with the pool and a person in white in the background.

The final sequence takes place on a golf course with many palm trees, bright green grass, sand traps, and a golf cart. A wide shot shows two golfers on the course. A closer shot shows a man wearing a light-colored patterned sweater vest, cap, and blue trousers holding a smartphone up in one hand, with another golfer behind him.

A close-up of the smartphone screen follows. The phone displays a travel-booking-style interface with a dark header that appears to say “ORBITZ” or a similar wordmark. Below it are rows of listings with small thumbnail images and prices or text, though most details are too small to read. A finger interacts with the screen.

The golfer is then shown near a flagstick on the green. A blue-and-white flag with the same stylized logo/wordmark waves in the wind. The man stands beside it, and the golf course with palm trees stretches behind him. The final shot returns to a close-up of the waving blue-and-white branded flag against the sky, with the lettering again partly obscured by motion and folds.
